title: Cobble Battle Music
description: This resource pack introduces iconic battle themes from various mainline Pokémon games, enhancing the atmosphere of every trainer or wild Pokémon encounter to Cobblemon.
body:
## CobbleBattleMusic

Bring the excitement of classic Pokémon battles to Cobblemon! This resource pack introduces iconic battle themes from various mainline Pokémon games, enhancing the atmosphere of every trainer or wild Pokémon encounter.

### Features
1. Includes a curated selection of battle themes from multiple generations of Pokémon games. Relive the nostalgia of classic tracks while engaging in Cobblemon battles
2. Compatible with Cobblemon 1.6.
